title: PM Domain V1 Source Data Population
objective: Obtain V1 PM source data through a read-only source connection or controlled export, populate the staging-only migration mapping tables created in packet 009a, and produce readiness evidence for a later dry-run migration without changing production systems.
required_inputs: Migration infrastructure from packet 009a present in staging
Read-only source access or controlled export for V1 projects, scopes, tasks, and resource assignments
constrained_outputs: Staging-only source data load or mapping-population artifacts
A source data population handoff note with row counts, readiness results, and quality findings
Explicit list of unmappable, missing, or deferred source records
No production cutover work and no runtime code changes
validation_steps: Confirm all source-data access is read-only from the origin system and all writes occur only in staging mapping tables
Confirm project, scope, task, and assignment mapping tables are populated or explicitly blocked with named gaps
Confirm unmappable records and unresolved lineage gaps are surfaced rather than silently dropped
Confirm migration.v_dry_run_readiness is rerun and reported after population attempts
Confirm no production data movement, cutover work, or runtime adoption changes occur in this packet
sql_permission_note: Packet 009b authorizes staging-only population of migration mapping tables and readiness validation using the mapping rules and infrastructure from packets 009 and 009a. It may read from source systems but does not authorize production writes, production migration, or runtime changes.
